219 HLG_STG_3_ULCR_NUM HLG_STG_3_ULCR_NUM M0900C Healed Stage 3 Ulcers Number CHAR 1 The number of Stage 3 pressure ulcers present on the admission that have healed on discharge.
220 HLG_STG_4_ULCR_NUM HLG_STG_4_ULCR_NUM M0900D Healed Stage 4 Ulcers Number CHAR 1 The number of Stage 4 pressure ulcers present on the admission that have healed on discharge.
